title: Contacts
description: Auto-collected contacts from all channel interactions.
searchPlaceholder: Search by name, username, or ID...
emptyDescription: Contacts will appear here as users interact with your agents through channels.
noMatchDescription: Try a different search term or filter.

permissionsNote.title: Channel permissions for contact names
permissionsNote.telegram: Telegram — Names and usernames available automatically.
permissionsNote.discord: Discord — Display names and usernames available automatically.
permissionsNote.slack: Slack — Display names resolved via Slack API (bot must be in workspace).
permissionsNote.feishu: Feishu/Lark — Requires contact:user.base:readonly permission. Without this, names will be empty.

merge.dialogDescription: Link selected contacts to a tenant user identity. This identifies them as the same person across channels.
merge.comingSoon: This feature is under development and not yet available.
